name: PagerDuty
description: Connect Cline to PagerDuty through this MCP server configuration from the imported plugin marketplace bundle.

env.name: PAGERDUTY_API_KEY
env.description: PagerDuty API key for the remote MCP server.

install.notes: Imported from plugin bundle config `pagerduty/.mcp.json`. The remote server requires the configured HTTP header values at runtime.
